channel.title: Company — paype.cc
channel.description: About paype.cc — the pipe for your money. A registered Money Services Business. Contact us, learn about the team.

item.title: About paype.cc
item.description: paype.cc gives every business in the world instant access to every way of moving money — without the gatekeeping and paperwork. FinCEN-registered MSB.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Get in touch with paype.cc — contact form, Telegram @paype, WhatsApp, or email. For support, sales, legal, or just to say hi.
